meta.title: Matchic — Know What to Wear. Every Day.
meta.description: Standing in front of your closet with nothing to wear? Matchic uses on-device AI to suggest outfits from clothes you already own. No uploads. No tracking.
meta.ogTitle: Matchic — Know What to Wear. Every Day.
meta.ogDescription: Standing in front of your closet with nothing to wear? Matchic uses on-device AI to suggest outfits from clothes you already own.
meta.twitterTitle: Matchic — Know What to Wear. Every Day.
meta.twitterDescription: Staring at your closet with nothing to wear? AI outfit suggestions from your own wardrobe. No cloud. No tracking.

hero.eyebrow: AI Outfit Suggestions from Your Own Closet
hero.title: Standing in Front of a Full Closet with Nothing to Wear?
hero.subtitle: Matchic suggests outfits from clothes you already own — powered by AI that lives on your phone. No uploads. No tracking. No account needed.

problem.title: 7:15 AM. Running Late. Staring at Clothes You Forgot You Had.
problem.subtitle: Most people wear the same few outfits while 80% of their wardrobe sits untouched. Not because the clothes are bad — because you forgot they exist.
problem.stat1Label: of wardrobe typically worn. The rest? Forgotten.
problem.stat2Label: spent yearly on clothes that go unworn
problem.stat3Label: every morning deciding what to wear
problem.stat4Label: of fashion ends up unworn in the first year

appPreview.caption: Your closet, organized and searchable — all on your phone.

solution.title: Matchic Remembers Everything So You Don't Have To
solution.subtitle: Snap your clothes once. Matchic catalogs them, tags them automatically, and suggests outfits every morning — from what you actually own.
solution.point1: Snap a photo — AI recognizes every item instantly
solution.point2: Get outfit suggestions for any occasion
solution.point3: Track what you wear. Shop smarter. Waste less.
solution.point4: Everything stays on your phone. Always.

howItWorks.title: Your Morning Routine in 30 Seconds
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No setup. No learning curve.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Photograph your clothes. One by one or in batches. Matchic identifies colors, styles, materials — instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell Matchic the occasion: work, date, gym, lazy Sunday. It suggests combinations from your actual clothes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Log what you wear. See what you never use. Build a wardrobe you actually love.

features.title: Everything Your Closet Needs
features.feature1Desc: Stuck on what to wear? Matchic suggests combinations from your real wardrobe — not from a store catalog.
features.feature2Desc: Point your camera at any piece. Matchic identifies the category, color, material, and style automatically.
features.feature3Desc: See what you wear most, what sits unused, and how much of your closet you actually use.
features.feature4Desc: Works on a plane, in a basement, anywhere. No internet needed. Ever.
features.feature5Desc: Open the app and start. No email, no password, no cloud sync.
features.feature6Desc: Export, backup, or delete everything anytime. Your wardrobe data belongs to you.

onDeviceAI.title: Your Photos Never Leave Your Phone
onDeviceAI.subtitle: Matchic uses Google's MediaPipe and Gemma 3 to process everything locally. We physically cannot see your photos — because we don't have servers.
onDeviceAI.point1Desc: AI models run directly on your device using MediaPipe GenAI.
onDeviceAI.point2Desc: Every photo stays on your phone. No server. No database.
onDeviceAI.point3Desc: Use Matchic on a plane, in a basement, anywhere. No connection needed.
onDeviceAI.point4Desc: Export, backup, or delete everything anytime. It's yours.

privacyComparison.title: How Matchic Compares
privacyComparison.subtitle: We built Matchic differently because we believe your wardrobe is personal.

sustainability.title: Wear More. Buy Less.
sustainability.subtitle: The most sustainable outfit is the one already in your closet. Matchic helps you fall in love with your clothes again.
sustainability.point1Desc: Discover outfits you forgot you had. Reduce impulse purchases.
sustainability.point2Desc: See what you actually wear. Buy only what you need.
sustainability.point3Desc: Build a versatile, curated wardrobe that works harder.
sustainability.point4Desc: Make informed decisions about what to keep, donate, or buy.

openSource.title: Your Wardrobe, Your Rules
openSource.subtitle: Matchic gives you full control over your data. Export everything, back it up, or delete it all — anytime. We don't collect your data because we believe your wardrobe is personal.

waitlist.title: Never Stand in Front of Your Closet Confused Again
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and be the first to try Matchic. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
waitlist.privacyNote: We won't share your email. We won't track you. We don't even have a server.

faq.title: Questions? We Have Answers.
faq.a1: Yes. Matchic is free. We don't sell data because we don't collect any.
faq.a2: No. You can use Matchic without creating an account. Your data stays on your device.
faq.a3: Yes. All features work without internet. The AI runs entirely on your phone.
faq.a4: No. Your photos never leave your device. They are processed locally by on-device AI.
faq.a5: Matchic uses Google's MediaPipe GenAI framework and Gemma 3 model, both running locally on your device.
faq.a6: Yes. Your wardrobe data is stored locally and can be exported or backed up anytime.
faq.q7: Can I export my wardrobe data?
faq.a7: Yes. Your wardrobe data is stored locally and can be exported or backed up anytime. You own your data.
faq.q8: Will there be an iOS version?
faq.a8: Yes. We are building for both iOS and Android. Join the waitlist to be notified.

finalCTA.title: Ready to Stop Wasting Mornings?
finalCTA.subtitle: Join thousands who want to spend less time deciding and more time living.

footer.tagline: Your wardrobe, understood — completely on your device.
footer.madeWith: Made with care for people who value their time.
